description: PR2 scenario #2 — wrong gender only. A female section has NO room of the matching gender at the required slot; every candidate room in the zone is male-segregated. Capacity and type would otherwise fit. Expected reason: NO_ROOM_GENDER.
notes: Covers the gender filter at commit 4's Stage 1 existence check. Today's flow falls through to site 3 (rooming.py:324) with no reason; after PR2 the stage-1 oracle catches it before placement tries and emits a typed reason.
RoomProfile.gender extension is the commit-4 dataclass growth — decision (i) from the DoR sign-off.
